Keyboard Shortcuts

Work faster — press ? anywhere to open this guide

Navigation

Quick switcherCtrl + K
Go to HomeG then H
Go to DMsG then D
Next / previous channelAlt + ↑ ↓
Toggle sidebarCtrl + \
Search everythingCtrl + /

Messaging

Send messageEnter
New lineShift + Enter
Edit last message↑
Reply in threadT
Add reactionCtrl + Shift + \
Mark as unreadU

Formatting

BoldCtrl + B
ItalicCtrl + I
StrikethroughCtrl + Shift + X
Inline codeCtrl + Shift + C
BlockquoteCtrl + Shift + 9
Insert linkCtrl + Shift + U

Calls

Toggle muteCtrl + Shift + M
Toggle videoCtrl + Shift + V
Push to talkSpace
Share screenCtrl + Shift + S
Raise handCtrl + H
Leave callCtrl + Shift + L

Tip: shortcuts use ⌘ in place of Ctrl on macOS.
